post.html:
Hello!

The Building with AI Bootcamp begins with an introduction to Vibe Coding to give you and end-to-end understanding of building and publishing a full application with a rich UI, database, user authentication, and the ability to accept payments.

Brandon Middleton Introduces Replit's agentic coding platform and guides you through building and shipping an entire application from scratch. His slides are linked here. Use the password vibecodingwithbrandon to access the slide deck.

Watch the course on Master.dev
post.markdown:
Hello!

The Building with AI Bootcamp begins with an introduction to Vibe Coding to give you and end-to-end understanding of building and publishing a full application with a rich UI, database, user authentication, and the ability to accept payments. 

[Brandon Middleton][brandon] Introduces Replit's agentic coding platform and guides you through building and shipping an entire application from scratch. [His slides are linked here][slides]. Use the password `vibecodingwithbrandon` to access the slide deck.

Watch the course on [Master.dev][course]

[brandon]: https://x.com/brmiddle
[slides]: https://vibe-coding-with-brandon.replit.app/
[course]: https://master.dev/workshops/vibe-coding-bootcamp/
post.title: Vibe Coding 101
